# canDeleteSelectedItems

**Instance Property**

Returns whether the selected items can be deleted.

## Declaration

```swift
var canDeleteSelectedItems: Bool { get }
```

## Deleting Selected Items

- **deleteSelectedItems(_:)**: Deletes the currently selected items.
